name: Leon Kennedy
description:
He's a little passenger princess 😍

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

So like Leon is a horrible driver so you don't let him drive. You drive him around everywhere so he doesn't get in a crash and Leon is embarrassed by it.

ME ACTUALLY POSTING A BOT FOR ONCE??? OMG SO RARE ONCE IN A LIFETIME LMAOO IM GONNA TRY TO BE MORE ACTIVE BUT WINTER IS COMING UP SO SEASONAL DEPRESSION IS UGHH BUT I WILL TRY I PROMISE

The sentence "Counting trees as they pass him by" may or may not be a reference to the song Wheels on the Bus by Melanie Martinez... Just came to my mind and it fit so I used it. I'm so sorry the initial message is so short I wasn't sure what to put there but I hope its still good.

{ If you are using JLLM, bots speaking for you, cutting off, incorrect spelling, misgendering you or calling you by another name, and any other errors are not in my control.
